hyperparameters.untrained_pot_file_dir: Directory with the untrained directory. It normally is `path/to/mlip-2/root/directory/untrained_mtps`.
hyperparameters.mtp_level: MTP level; only even numbers from 2 to 28
hyperparameters.min_dist: Minimum distance (in Angstrom) between two atoms to consider. I strongly suggest to determine it exactly (e.g. with mlipkit.mlip_models.utils.find_min_dist, or see parameter <up_mindist>).
hyperparameters.max_dist: Maximum distance (in Angstrom) to consider for the radial functions.
hyperparameters.radial_basis_type: Radial basis set. `RBChebyshev` is the most used one.
hyperparameters.radial_basis_size: How many radial functions to use.
hyperparameters.ene_weight: Weight for the energy in the fit. It will be normalized by the sum of weights of energy, forces and stress.
hyperparameters.for_weight: Weight for the forces in the fit. It will be normalized by the sum of weights of energy, forces and stress.
hyperparameters.str_weight: Weight for the stress tensor in the fit. It will be normalized by the sum of weights of energy, forces and stress.
hyperparameters.sc_b_for: `--scale_by_force` for the mlip-2 binary; If >0 then configurations near equilibrium (with roughtly force < <sc_b_for>) get more weight.
hyperparameters.max_iter: Maximum number of iterations for the training process.
hyperparameters.cur_pot_n: Save potential on each iteration if not empty.
hyperparameters.bfgs_tol: The training stops if error dropped by a factor smaller than this over 50 BFGS iterations. Default=1e-3
hyperparameters.weighting: How to weight configuration wtih different sizes relative to each other. Default=vibrations. Other=molecules, structures.
hyperparameters.init_par: How to initialize parameters if a potential was not pre-fitted. Default is random. Other is same - this is when interaction of all species is the same (more accurate fit, but longer optimization).
hyperparameters.skip_preinit: Bool. Skip the 75 iterations done when parameters are not given.
hyperparameters.up_mindist: Bool. Update the mindist parameter with actual minimal interatomic distance in the training set.
hyperparameters.bin_pref: Whatever to write before the binary path when launching mlip-2 (e.g. `mpirun`).

parameters_compute_properties.bin_pref: Whatever to write before the binary path when launching mlip-2 (e.g. `mpirun`).

trained_pot_files.potential_file: pot.mtp - Output file .mtp; it is the only file needed.
